message.content:
@startuml
actor "ユーザ" as user
boundary "ブラウザ" as browser
control "web.php" as web
control "PersonController" as controller
entity "Person" as person
boundary "person.find.blade" as view

user -> browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[person/find]
browser -> web : GET[person/find]
web -> controller : @find
controller -> view
view --> controller
controller --> web
web --> browser
browser --> user

user -> view : findボタン押下
view -> web : POST
web -> controller : @search
controller -> person : find()
person --> controller
controller -> view : getData()
view --> controller
@enduml
